bust portrait of a glamorous jazz singer in a beaded dress, 3/4 view
bust portrait of a young poet with round glasses holding a notebook, 3/4 view
bust portrait of a tired but kind off-duty police officer, 3/4 view
bust portrait of a sharp-suited theater critic with a pocket watch, 3/4 view
bust portrait of an elderly aunt in a knitted shawl, 3/4 view
a cut crystal old fashioned glass with amber liquid and one large ice cube on a wooden counter
a copper cocktail shaker with condensation droplets, dark plum background
an unlabeled dark rum bottle with a wax seal, dark plum background
a coupe glass of pale sparkling cocktail with a lemon twist
a wooden muddler and a brass jigger crossed on a folded bar towel
a bowl of bright citrus fruit beside a paring knife on a cutting board
wide view of a dim cozy cocktail bar interior with shelves of glowing bottles
a velvet-curtained speakeasy back room with a single warm hanging bulb
a rain-streaked bar window at night with soft neon glow bleeding through
a bar counter corner with a lit candle and a folded newspaper
a vintage brass cash register on a worn wooden counter

style_block: cozy-noir painterly illustration, warm amber and deep plum and teal palette, single warm key light from upper-left at 45 degrees, teal fill in shadows, visible brush texture, no photorealism, no pixel art

portraits.template: {trigger} {style}, bust portrait of {subject}, 3/4 view facing screen-left, flat dark-teal vignette background, no hands, no props crossing frame

vips.template: {trigger} {style}, dramatic bust portrait of {subject}, 3/4 view facing screen-left, subtle neon magenta accent, dark-teal vignette background

ingredients.template: {trigger} {style}, single {subject} as a game item sprite, centered, whole object fully visible, dark plum plain background, no text

tools.template: {trigger} {style}, single {subject} bar tool as a game item illustration, centered, dark plum plain background

backgrounds.template: {trigger} {style}, {subject}, wide dim cocktail bar interior, shelves of glowing bottles, candle-lit counter, atmospheric depth

ui.template: {subject}, flat game UI element, warm amber and deep plum palette, clean silhouette, centered on plain background
